title: erigeron croaticus
intro: Erigeron croaticus, also known as the Croatian fleabane or snake's tongue, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its high content of essential oils and flavonoids. Erigeron croaticus is often prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
